module.name: waterfall
module.description: A waterfall chart: a starting value, +/- delta bars floating at the running level, and an automatic total bar. Lines "Label | +30" / "Label | -12".
module.aiSpec:
A WATERFALL chart — shows how a value builds up: a start bar, floating +/- delta bars, and a TOTAL bar (added automatically). Block module, one step per line (sections merged): `Start | 100` first line = the absolute starting value, `Sales | +30` increase (green), `Costs | -12` decrease (red). Params: `total` — label for the auto total bar (default "Total"; set `none` to omit), `unit` — suffix printed after values (e.g. %, M) (default ""), `height` — plot height in pixels (default 210), `showvalues` — print the value on top of each bar (default true), `upcolor` — fill colour for increase bars (default "#22c55e" green), `downcolor` — fill colour for decrease bars (default "#ef4444" red).
<!-- @waterfall total: Net, height: 260, unit: k --> Start | 100 Sales | +30 Costs | -12 <!-- @end -->

param.name: total
param.label: Total bar label (none = omit)
param.desc: Label for the auto-computed total bar; set to none to omit it.

param.name: unit
param.label: Value suffix
param.desc: Suffix printed after each value, e.g. % or M (blank = none).

param.name: height
param.label: Plot height (px)
param.desc: Height of the plotting area in pixels.

param.name: showvalues
param.label: Show values
param.desc: Print each bar's value above it.

param.name: upcolor
param.label: Increase color
param.desc: Fill colour of the positive (increase) bars.

param.name: downcolor
param.label: Decrease color
param.desc: Fill colour of the negative (decrease) bars.

snippet.label: Waterfall chart
snippet.text: <!-- @waterfall total: Net --> Start | 100 Sales | +30 Costs | -12 Tax | -8 <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Start value, +/- floating deltas, automatic total.
